checks.summary: Vertical slice, frontend, environment, presentation, scoring, replay, and debug contracts are source-controlled and linked.
The gate requires complete, failure/rescue, restart, replay review, and scoring paths before the vertical slice can be accepted.
The gate references the passing full C++ validation gate, the Milestone 20 Unreal live-water smoke gate, South Fork corridor data, presentation cues, and debug overlays.
The gate requires runtime profile evidence, environment quality budgets, replay bookmarks, debug overlays, and guide-seat/river-fidelity review captures.
SmokeEmIfYouGotEmEditor Mac Development target built successfully after the Milestone 23 gate contracts were added.

notes: This report closes the source-controlled Milestone 23 gate in the repo workspace.
The gate does not replace later human/guide playtest capture, VR headset validation, platform packaging, or release certification.
If any linked validation report, corridor package, frontend flow, scoring contract, or runtime authority changes, regenerate this gate report.
